questions.question: Describe the difference between a one-dimensional array and a two-dimensional array in terms of indexing and memory allocation.
Write a C program to initialize a 2D array using the compiler's built-in initialization feature.
questions.hint: Assume the size of the array is 3x4

questions.question: What is the purpose of the `#include <stdio.h>` and `#include <stdlib.h>` headers in the following C program that uses arrays? Explain with an example.
